prompt: A dramatic Japanese anime announcement poster set in a rain-soaked futuristic neon megacity at night, with a wide cinematic composition and glossy cyberpunk lighting in electric blue, magenta, violet, and red. At the top center, a huge metallic silver sci-fi logo reads FORMULA NEO, with a sharp emblem to the right and small Japanese subtitle text beneath it. Across the middle, place a large beveled gold banner with bold black Japanese text TVアニメ化決定！. Under that, add a white release line in Japanese reading 2027年4月放送開始予定. In the foreground, line up exactly 8 anime characters shoulder to shoulder, full body, facing forward like a cast reveal: 1) a tall figure in a white futuristic racing-style coat and suit with cyan glowing trim, white hair, and a cool aura; 2) a red-haired young man in a black and orange jacket with flame motifs, dark pants, sneakers, and fiery effects around one arm, holding a thick book or tablet-like object; 3) a mysterious person in a long purple robe or coat with gold trim, elegant and mage-like; 4) a central protagonist in a dark navy or black racing jumpsuit with subtle cyan piping and a serious stance; 5) a shorter tech-oriented character in a dark outfit with glowing cyan holographic interface panels around one hand; 6) a silver-haired rugged man in gray-black tactical streetwear with crossed arms, gloves, utility straps, and a hardened expression; 7) a green-haired young woman in a casual green-and-white hoodie and pants, shy posture, holding an object close to her chest; 8) a blond young man in a mustard-yellow vest over a shirt with black tie and decorative starry or dotted dark pants, standing next to a small pink-haired girl in an oversized pastel hoodie and shorts, looking down at a handheld device. The city background should include towering skyscrapers packed with neon signage, glowing Japanese and Roman-letter billboards, motion blur, wet reflective pavement, and several futuristic race cars speeding through the street on the left and right with red taillights and cyan highlights. Add small Japanese production-credit text centered along the bottom edge, including a clearly visible fiction disclaimer in Japanese. The image should feel like an official anime adaptation key visual for a fictional racing-and-cyber fantasy franchise, hyper-polished, high contrast, poster-ready, and slightly tongue-in-cheek but convincing.
